Disk Organiser
===============

Disk Organiser helps users visualise and safely organise files on their
local filesystem. It emphasises data-safety (automatic backups for any
organise actions), a minimal and extensible frontend, and optional
AI-assisted suggestions via pluggable model providers.

Website: https://krahd.github.io/disk_organiser/
Source: https://github.com/krahd/disk_organiser

See `README.md` and the `docs/` folder for usage, installation and
developer notes.
